title: Crawl Bot Evidence Check
vercel_logs: Not accessible — Vercel does not expose raw access logs via filesystem. Vercel Analytics/Logs require paid plan or dashboard access.
nginx_logs: Not available — Vercel is serverless, no nginx logs on disk.
local_logs: Old ops logs from Jun 3-6 exist but predate Phase 32 deployment by 12+ days.

alternative_evidence.gsc_url_inspection: lastCrawlTime: never for all 6 URLs — confirms zero Googlebot visits
alternative_evidence.gsc_search_analytics: 0 impressions for all 6 URLs — confirms zero Google impressions
alternative_evidence.indexnow_202: Bing accepted submission but no crawl evidence available (Bing doesn't expose crawl API)

conclusion: No crawl bot evidence available. GSC data is the only reliable source. GSC confirms: 0 Googlebot crawls for any Phase 32 URL as of Jun 19 01:00 EEST.
